tools.name: search_games
tools.description: Search the cheat database for games by name. Optionally filter by gaming platform/system. Returns matching games with their cheat counts.

tools.name: get_cheats
tools.description: Retrieve all cheats and walkthroughs for a specific game by its game ID. Use search_games first to find the game ID.

tools.name: get_cheat_detail
tools.description: Get the full details of a specific cheat by its cheat ID, including the complete cheat text/walkthrough content and screenshots.

tools.name: list_systems
tools.description: List all available gaming platforms/systems in the cheat database (PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo, PC, etc.) with their game and cheat counts.

tools.name: get_recent_cheats
tools.description: Get the most recently added cheats in the database.

tools.name: get_database_stats
tools.description: Get overall statistics about the cheat database: total cheats, total games, total platforms, etc.
